title: AI warfare triggers Putin, as Kremlin moves to dismantle the last pieces of Russian internet
content:

Vladimir Putin does not use or know how to use Internet. Screenshot of YouTube video from YouTube Channel. Fair use.

title: Hungary just held its most consequential election since 1989
content:
The people ousted its government of 16 years

Originally published on Global Voices

In Hungary, people celebrated the historical win of the opposition party. Screenshot of YouTube video from the 444.hu YouTube Channel. Fair use.

On April 12, 2026, Hungary held one of its most important elections in nearly four decades, widely broadcast for its relevance not just on a domestic scale, but globally. Prior to the polls, Prime Minister Viktor Orbán had enjoyed the

title: Support the Global Voices Spotlight: Positive action on climate
content:
In May we are looking at the actions people are taking to fight the climate crisis

Originally published on Global Voices

Image by Gabriela Mesones Rojo for Global Voices

The Global South — from Sub-Saharan Africa to the Pacific Islands, from the Amazon Basin to Western Asia — is at the forefront of a crisis that was largely created by just a few wealthy nations. These regions are facing the most severe and immediate consequences of climate change: rising oceans, prolonged droughts, accelerating deforestation, disrupted food systems, and mass displacement. Yet these same communities are
snippet: In May we are looking at the actions people are taking to fight the climate crisisOriginally published on Global VoicesImage by Gabriela Mesones Rojo for Global Voices The Global South — from Sub-Saha
creator: Global Voices Announcements

title: Research reveals that EU AI rules stop at its borders with little accountability for human rights impacts abroad

title: Inside China’s hidden eating disorder communities
content:
Social media has facilitated the glamorization of eating disorders

Originally published on Global Voices

A low-calorie meal shared on Xiaohongshu in the ED networks. Edited screenshot. Fair use.

On Chinese social media platforms, eating disorders are no longer only discussed as health conditions — they are increasingly reframed as disciplined lifestyles, aesthetic goals, and even sources of belonging.

I first encountered these communities almost by accident. Having grown up in an environment where body weight was c

title: When climate change impairs beekeeping in the Democratic Republic of the Congo
content:

A beehive in the DRC. Screenshot from YouTube.

title: Young men, masculinity and states of emergency in the Caribbean
content:
Under state of emergency regulations, search powers expand and detention without charge becomes permissible

Originally published on Global Voices

Feature image via Canva Pro.

In many communities across Trinidad and Tobago, the twin-island nation at the southernmost end of the Caribbean archipelago, the presence of the state is highly visible during periods of heightened security, especially as patrols intensify.
